description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of light-colored brickwork and large glass windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a prominent garage with a blue car parked in the driveway, and a main entrance door set between two large windows. A small landscaped area with a tree is present on one side, adding greenery to the property. The roof has two skylights and a rooftop terrace area, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and a functional layout typical of urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a garage, featuring minimalist brick and glass design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, large windows, driveway, and a blue car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, skylights, and the blue car parked in the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, rooftop terrace, and a tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the tree in the foreground, flat roof, and the garage visible at the back.
